etymology.description: Depicts a hand 又 holding a stylized flag 中 -> original meaning 'representative, ambassador' -> evolved to mean 'history'
etymology.interpretation: The character 史(shǐ, 'history') originated from the depiction of a hand holding a flag, symbolizing a representative or ambassador who would record events. Over time, this idea evolved to represent the recording of events as history.

examples.chinese: 中国的历史悠久(中國的歷史悠久)。
examples.english: China's history is long and rich.

examples.chinese: 他对世界历史很感兴趣(他對世界歷史很感興趣)。
examples.pinyin: Tā duì shìjiè lìshǐ hěn gǎn xìngqù.
examples.english: He is very interested in world history.

examples.chinese: 历史可以教会我们很多东西(歷史可以教會我們很多東西)。
examples.pinyin: Lìshǐ kěyǐ jiāohuì wǒmen hěn duō dōngxī.
examples.english: History can teach us many things.
